ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., SS, 2B, 1B) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Batting and throwing handedness (e.g., Right, Left, Switch) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current contract status (e.g., Signed, Free Agent) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status (e.g., Healthy, Injured) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "inning" TEXT /* Inning in which the stats were recorded */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "rbi" INTEGER /* Runs batted in */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "strikeouts" INTEGER /* Number of strikeouts */,
  "left_on_base" INTEGER /* Number of runners left on base */,
  "batting_avg" REAL /* Batting average for the game */,
  "ops" REAL /* On-base plus slugging percentage */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "batting_order" INTEGER /* Batting order of the player in the lineup */,
  "sacrifice_bunts" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice bunts */,
  "sacrifice_flies" INTEGER /* Number of sacrifice flies */,
  "hit_by_pitch" INTEGER /* Number of times hit by pitch */,
  "doubles" INTEGER /* Number of doubles */,
  "triples" INTEGER /* Number of triples */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "stolen_bases" INTEGER /* Number of stolen bases */,
  "caught_stealing" INTEGER /* Number of times caught stealing */,
  "ground_into_double_play" INTEGER /* Number of times grounded into double play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., MLB, AL, NL) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Stadium capacity */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire_name" TEXT /* Name of the home plate umpire */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the home plate umpire */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "home_runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total home runs scored by the home team */,
  "away_runs_scored" INTEGER /* Total home runs scored by the away team */,
  "home_team_hits" INTEGER /* Total hits by the home team */,
  "away_team_hits" INTEGER /* Total hits by the away team */,
  "home_team_errors" INTEGER /* Total errors by the home team */,
  "away_team_errors" INTEGER /* Total errors by the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team they coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in coaching */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "contract_expiration" TEXT /* Date the coach's contract expires */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the coach's photo */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
